All files are updated correctly. Here's a summary of what changed:

**Centralized in `Directory.Build.props`** — all versions now defined as MSBuild properties:

| Package | Old → New |
|---|---|
| `System.Text.Json` | 8.0.5 / 9.0.0 / 10.0.1 → **10.0.5** |
| `Azure.Storage.Blobs` | 12.19.0 / 12.24.0 → **12.27.0** |
| `Microsoft.Extensions.Logging` | 9.0.0 → **10.0.5** |
| `Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting` | 8.0.1 → **10.0.5** |
| `NewtonsoftJson (net8.0)` | 8.0.11 → **8.0.25** |
| `OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting` | 1.15.0 → **1.15.1** |
| `xunit` | 2.9.3 *(already latest)* |
| `NewtonsoftJson (net6.0)` | 6.0.36 *(already latest)* |

**Key improvements:**
- **No more hardcoded versions** in any `.csproj` — every project uses `$(PropertyName)` references
- **Legacy.csproj** now uses the same centralized properties instead of its own stale versions
- **Common.props** Logging version also uses a property from `Directory.Build.props`
- Single place to update any version going forward
